title: Angel Wings
description: A resource pack that makes the elytra look more like an angel's wings.
body:
---
### ℹ️ Information
This resource pack changes the elytra texture & model to look like an angel's wings.
</br>No external mods are needed to use this resource pack.
Make sure to disable the cape (only the capes that change the elyta texture) so the texture loads correctly.

---
### 📜 Credits
Textures created by CloudSven (me)
